message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
participant "Client" as Client
participant "Server" as Server
participant "Other Client" as OtherClient

activate Client
activate Server
Client -> Server : changeVideoServer
activate OtherClient
Server -> OtherClient : changeVideoClient
Server --> Client : callback
deactivate OtherClient
deactivate Server
deactivate Client
@enduml
```
